data.title: Small caps close to all-time high, Eli Lilly tests key level, Ulta Beauty leads earnings. Dow Jones futures rise. 5 stocks in buy zones.
data.description: Small cap stocks came close to reaching their highest levels ever as the larger stock indexes halted their momentum. Eli Lilly is currently positioned at a critical point, with Robinhood making significant purchases. Ulta Beauty reported strong earnings results late in the day. Following the surge in small cap stocks, Dow Jones futures are on the rise, with Eli Lilly being closely monitored as it approaches a key level. Additionally, there are five stocks currently in buy zones according to reports.

data.description: According to technical analysis, it is predicted that SOL may potentially increase to a range of $155 to $165 within the next 2 to 4 weeks. The initial obstacle is at $146.91, which will serve as a key test to determine if an upward trend will continue.

data.title: ADA price forecast aims for $0.39-$0.65 in the short term, and $1.69 potential recovery in the medium term despite current weakness.
data.description: The forecast for ADA price is showing conflicting signals, with short-term projections ranging between $0.39 to $0.65. However, the medium-term outlook for Cardano suggests a possible recovery to $1.69.

data.title: XRP price expected to reach $2.35-$2.70 in 30 days despite current consolidation and 4.35% drop to $2.10.
data.description: Predictions for XRP indicate a potential rebound to a range between $2.35 and $2.70 in the next 30 days, fueled by bullish MACD signals. Despite a recent 4.35% drop, the price has found support at $2.10. This suggests a positive outlook for XRP in the near future.

data.description: TELUS has made their base shelf prospectus available for public access, and the prospectus supplement for a CAD$ offering will be available within two business days through SEDAR. Vancouver, BC - On Dec. 4, 2025, TELUS revealed the pricing of a US$1.5 billion aggregate principal amount offering.

data.title: BNB price expected to hit $1,150 in 30 days with critical resistance at $920 for upside breakout.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about the future of BNB, forecasting a price target of $1,150 within the next month. Currently, there is a crucial resistance level at $920 that will determine whether the cryptocurrency can experience a significant upward movement. This bullish momentum is expected to continue building as investors closely watch the $920 zone for a potential breakout.

data.title: Viwoods launches AiPaper Reader C with color display, AI, turning reading into intelligent dialogue. Los Angeles, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Viwoods has revealed the AiPaper Reader C, a revolutionary color E-Ink Pocket Device infused with built-in AI technology that transforms reading into an interactive, intelligent experience. This cutting-edge gadget was officially introduced in Los Angeles on December 4, 2025. With its unique features, the reader enables users to engage in a two-way dialogue while exploring content. This innovative device marks a significant development in the reading technology space, providing users with a dynamic and immersive reading experience unlike any other.

data.title: Binance founder CZ believes Peter Schiff is close to accepting Bitcoin's potential but remains stubborn. CZ challenges Schiff with viral stunt, emphasizing Schiff's understanding of fiat money problems. Schiff views Bitcoin as a speculative asset.
data.description: Binance founder CZ criticized Peter Schiff for being too obstinate to embrace Bitcoin as a solution despite his understanding of fiat money issues. CZ revealed his failed attempt to challenge Schiff with a gold bar authenticity test during the Binance Blockchain Week. According to CZ, while Schiff acknowledges problems with current monetary systems, he sees Bitcoin primarily as a speculative asset. The former Binance CEO believes Schiff's resistance stems from his lack of hands-on Bitcoin experience. CZ described Schiff as a gentleman despite their differing views. Full details are on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Protara prices public offering at $5.75/share, offering 13,043,479 shares for approx $75 million.额宗金额期为不记录费和折扣。
data.description: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. announced a public offering of 13,043,479 shares of common stock at $5.75 per share, totaling around $75 million before expenses. The underwriters have an option to purchase an additional 1,956,521 shares. The offering, expected to close on December 8, 2025, will fund the clinical development of TARA-002 and other programs. Proceeds may also be used for working capital and general corporate purposes.

data.title: Symbotic prices offering of 10M shares of Class A stock at $55 per share, raising $550M, with option for more shares.
data.description: WILMINGTON, Mass., Dec. 04, 2025 - Symbotic Inc., listed on Nasdaq as SYM, a top player in A.I.-powered robotics technology for supply chain applications, disclosed the pricing details of its recent underwritten public offering. This offering involves the sale of 10,000,000 shares of its Class A common stock by both the Company and SVF Sponsor III (DE) LLC, an entity linked to SoftBank Group Corp. The Company is selling 6,500,000 shares, while the Selling Securityholder is selling 3,500,000 shares, all priced at $55.00 per share. Additionally, Symbotic has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an extra 1,500,000 shares of its Class A common stock at the same public offering price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions.
